name: TTArtisan Mini Magnetic LED Light
description: Mimicking the appearance of a roll of 35mm film, this Mini Magnetic LED Light from TTArtisan is a fun and convenient light that's perfect for bringing with you anywhere.

features.Key Features:: Color Temperatures: 3000, 4500 & 6000K | Magnetic Cold Shoe Mount | 300mAh Battery; 45-Minute Charge | 15 LED bulbs; CRI: 95 | USB-C Cable, Lanyard Carrying Strap
